title: Django models should define a `__str__` method
description: Models should define a `__str__` method to make debugging easier by providing a human-readable representation.
message: Model class '{class_name}' does not have a `__str__` method.
recommendation: Define a `__str__` method in the model class.
why_is_this_an_issue: Providing a human-readable representation of models helps developers debug issues more easily.
how_to_fix: Define a `__str__` method that returns a human-readable representation of the model instance.
